headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics faces class action over wireless connectivity service disruption

sentiment.reasoning: A class action lawsuit over service disruption indicates potential significant legal costs, reputational damage, and financial penalties.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
